# LLM Guide: use https://chizkiyahu.github.io/pypi-depgraph without manual UI

This website is a client-side app (no backend API endpoint). To use it without manual UI, run it in a headless browser and control it with URL params + DOM automation.

## Base URL
https://chizkiyahu.github.io/pypi-depgraph/

## Query parameters (state contract)
- `package`: PyPI package name (required to auto-run resolution)
- `version`: root package version (optional)
- `python`: python version string (example: `3.11`)
- `platform`: platform marker target (example: `linux`)
- `extras`: comma-separated extras (example: `standard,dev`)
- `overrides`: comma-separated `name:version` pairs (example: `urllib3:2.2.2,idna:3.7`)

Example URL:
https://chizkiyahu.github.io/pypi-depgraph/?package=fastapi&python=3.11&platform=linux&extras=standard

## Headless workflow (no manual clicks)
1. Open the URL with your desired params in a browser automation tool (Playwright/Puppeteer).
2. Wait until graph rendering completes (Export buttons appear).
3. Trigger either export button:
   - `Export JSON`
   - `Export Markdown`
4. Capture the downloaded file from the browser download directory.

## Important notes
- There is no official HTTP JSON API route; resolution happens in-browser.
- Output depends on `python`, `platform`, `extras`, and `overrides`.
- Project repository: https://github.com/chizkiyahu/pypi_graph
